creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
scheidell    2012-02-28 20:05:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    net-mgmt/observium   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/observium/files patch-html__pages__addhost.inc.php 
                             pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Add port net-mgmt/observium: As per WantedPorts.
  
  Observium is an autodiscovering PHP/MySQL/SNMP based network monitoring
  which includes support for a wide range of network hardware and
  operating systems including Cisco, Linux, FreeBSD, Juniper, Brocade,
  Foundry, HP and many more.
  
  - fix-up for invalid XML, fixed in upstream, but not in released version
  
  PR:             ports/165251
  Submitted by:   Mel Flynn <rflynn@acsalaska.net> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +132 -0    ports/net-mgmt/observium/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net-mgmt/observium/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/net-mgmt/observium/files/patch-html__pages__addhost.inc.php (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/net-mgmt/observium/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/net-mgmt/observium/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4228 -0   ports/net-mgmt/observium/pkg-plist (new)
